seo_title: AI Anime Avatar Generator — Turn Your Photo Into Anime | LazyKiwi
seo_description: Turn your photo into an anime avatar with LazyKiwi. Upload a selfie and become an anime character in seconds — perfect for profile pictures and social.

hero.title: Become an anime character.
hero.description: Upload a selfie and transform into a polished anime avatar in seconds. Keep your features and vibe, reimagined in your favourite anime style.

what_it_is.title: Your face, anime-fied.
what_it_is.intro: The LazyKiwi anime avatar generator turns your photo into a clean anime illustration — preserving your features, hairstyle and expression while rendering them in crisp, share-ready anime art.

steps.title: Upload your photo
steps.description: A clear, well-lit photo is all you need. Your photo, your starting point.

steps.title: Pick an anime style
steps.description: Choose an anime style or describe the look you want.

steps.title: Generate & download
steps.description: Preview the result, try a few more, then download your favourite.

features.title: An anime version that looks like you
features.description: Your features, hair and expression carry over, so the avatar feels personal, not generic.

features.title: From soft shoujo to bold shonen
features.description: Choose the style and palette that fits you — pastel and soft or sharp and dramatic.

features.title: PFP-perfect in seconds
features.description: Get a crisp avatar sized for profiles and socials, with no drawing skills required.

showcase.title: Selfie in, anime out
showcase.subtitle: Your photo reimagined across anime styles.

cards.title: Seconds, not days
cards.description: Results render almost instantly, so you can compare options before your coffee's cold.

cards.title: Private by default
cards.description: Your photos are processed securely and never sold. What you upload stays yours.

cards.title: Free to start
cards.description: No credit card to try. Get a real result on your own photo at zero cost.

cards.title: No regret
cards.description: Test the change risk-free and decide with your own eyes.

cards.title: Made for you
cards.description: Tuned for natural, believable results — not a filter slapped on top.

cards.title: No skills needed
cards.description: No Photoshop, no prompts to master. Upload, tap, done.

quotes.quote: I was nervous to try this, saw it on my own photo in seconds, and I'm obsessed. So much easier than guessing.
quotes.name: Mia R.

quotes.quote: Showed the LazyKiwi preview instead of trying to describe what I wanted. First time I got exactly what I pictured.
quotes.name: Daniel K.

quotes.quote: My before/after post blew up — it looks real because the avatar actually fits. Total game changer.

faqs.question: Is the anime avatar maker free?
faqs.answer: Yes. Upload a selfie and generate an anime avatar for free.

faqs.question: Will it look like me?
faqs.answer: Yes. Your features, hair and expression are preserved in the anime rendering.

faqs.question: What styles are available?
faqs.answer: Several anime styles from soft shoujo to bold shonen, plus chibi and manga ink.

faqs.question: What photo works best?
faqs.answer: A clear, front-facing selfie with your face well lit.

cta.title: Turn your photo into an anime avatar.
